rows.label: xs99110150_MSG0001
rows.name:
Lin-san, Tatsu is thinking of
becoming a wild Nopon, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110150_MSG0003
rows.name:
Since Tatsu is cooperating with BLADE,
appearance is important too, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110150_MSG0005
rows.name: Lin-san, you don't seem interested at all, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110150_MSG0007
rows.name:
I know! How about getting a tan? You might
become super popular with girls![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110150_MSG0008
rows.name:
I have some suntan oil that's perfect
for Tatsu! I'll put it on for you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110150_MSG0009
rows.name: I-If you insist, then please do, mo~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110150_MSG0011
rows.name:
But this oil... It has
a nice sweet smell, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110150_MSG0012
rows.name: It's just honey, don't worry about it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110150_MSG0013
rows.name:
To make delicious chicken
sauté, the prep work is important♪[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110150_MSG0014
rows.name: L-L-L-Lin-san! Tatsu is not chicken, mo~~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110150_MSG0016
rows.name:
You did that on purpose, mo!
Definitely on purpose, mo~~![ST:wait ]
